notes: Prospectors Plus 4.0.0 - the biggest update yet. NEW Cycle page: your whole pan loop drawn as a live diagram with a millisecond timeline graph - drag any slider and watch the timing change, click any bar to jump to the exact setting behind it. NEW Builds page: all your saved builds in one place with search, sort (newest / most used), descriptions and one-click load/overwrite. NEW Shards mode: exact-click digging with green dig-bar confirmation and an assume-full pipeline for one-click-fill farms. NEW live HUD overlay: a draggable card showing the current stage (Digging / Hold S / Glide / Shaking), live stats and a find ticker. Reworked finds detector (fade-direction tracker) counts fast skull bursts and dupes far more accurately. Big macOS smoothness fix: the shake no longer stutters under the analytics load. Codes are now machine-locked.
